title: Jklauber
compiled_truth: Jklauber is an external contact at [Llgm](companies/llgm). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-11-18), Jklauber sent 29 and received 670 emails, totalling 699 interactions. Top correspondents: [Elizabeth Sager](people/elizabeth-sager) (15), [Mark E Haedicke](people/mark-e-haedicke) (6), [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (6), [Vsharp](people/vsharp) (4), [Cyoder](people/cyoder) (3).
